summary.en: Nauru fire safety for BESS installations references NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) as the primary installation fire-safety standard. Building permit and installation approval from relevant Nauru authorities requires NFPA 855 compliance evidence, including energy capacity limits per zone, spacing requirements, fire detection and suppression system requirements, and ventilation for thermal runaway gas management.
summary.zh: 瑙鲁BESS安装消防安全以NFPA 855（固定储能系统安装标准）为主要安装消防安全标准。相关瑙鲁机构的建筑许可和安装审批要求提供NFPA 855合规证据，包括每区能量容量限制、间距要求、火灾探测和抑制系统要求，以及热失控气体管理通风要求。
summary.zht: 諾魯BESS安裝消防安全以NFPA 855（固定儲能系統安裝標準）為主要安裝消防安全標準。相關諾魯機構的建築許可和安裝審批要求提供NFPA 855合規證據，包括每區能量容量限制、間距要求、火災探測和抑制系統要求，以及熱失控氣體管理通風要求。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855:2023 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems)
NFPA 72:2022 (National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code)

summary.en: China uses GB 51048-2014 (Code for fire protection design of electrochemical energy storage station) and GB 50016-2014 (Code for fire protection design of buildings) for BESS fire safety. Chinese BESS products are tested and documented for fire safety per GB/T 36276 and GBT 36558 frameworks. Chinese fire safety documentation references GB standards — not NFPA 855 — and is not accepted by Nauru fire authority as a substitute.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 51048-2014（电化学储能电站消防设计规范）和GB 50016-2014（建筑设计防火规范）进行BESS消防安全管理。中国BESS产品按GB/T 36276和GB/T 36558框架进行消防安全测试和文件编制。中国消防安全文件参照GB标准——而非NFPA 855——不被瑙鲁消防机构接受为替代。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 51048-2014（電化學儲能電站消防設計規範）和GB 50016-2014（建築設計防火規範）進行BESS消防安全管理。中國BESS產品按GB/T 36276和GB/T 36558框架進行消防安全測試和文件編制。中國消防安全文件參照GB標準——而非NFPA 855——不被諾魯消防機構接受為替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 51048-2014 (Code for fire protection design of electrochemical energy storage station)
GB 50016-2014 (Code for fire protection design of buildings)

gap.en: Chinese BESS fire safety documentation referencing GB 51048 and GB 50016 is not accepted by Nauru authorities as a substitute for NFPA 855 compliance evidence. Exporters must provide: (1) NFPA 855 installation design; (2) thermal runaway propagation test evidence (UL 9540A or equivalent) to support NFPA 855 spacing calculations; (3) fire detection and suppression system design per NFPA 72 and NFPA 13 / 2001; and (4) approval from local fire authority. None of these are generated by standard GB certification processes.
gap.zh: 参照GB 51048和GB 50016编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不被瑙鲁机构接受为NFPA 855合规证据的替代。出口商须提供：（1）NFPA 855安装设计；（2）支持NFPA 855间距计算的热失控蔓延测试证据（UL 9540A或同等标准）；（3）依据NFPA 72和NFPA 13/2001的火灾探测和抑制系统设计；（4）当地消防机构批准。上述均非标准GB认证流程所产生。
gap.zht: 參照GB 51048和GB 50016編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不被諾魯機構接受為NFPA 855合規證據的替代。出口商須提供：（1）NFPA 855安裝設計；（2）支持NFPA 855間距計算的熱失控蔓延測試證據（UL 9540A或同等標準）；（3）依據NFPA 72和NFPA 13/2001的火災探測和抑制系統設計；（4）當地消防機構批准。上述均非標準GB認證流程所產生。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — building permit and installation approval prerequisite
mandatory_status.cn: GB 51048 / GB 50016 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to NFPA 855 for Nauru

source.publisher: Government of Nauru ministry responsible for energy and infrastructure

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NFPA 855 compliance evidence — including UL 9540A thermal runaway propagation test results to support spacing calculations — is required for Nauru BESS installation approval. Chinese GB 51048 / GB 50016 fire safety documentation is not an accepted substitute. A NFPA 855 installation design by a qualified fire protection engineer, reviewed and approved by the local Nauru fire authority, is required. This is independent of IEC 62619 product certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 瑙鲁BESS安装审批要求提供NFPA 855合规证据——包括支持间距计算的UL 9540A热失控蔓延测试结果。中国GB 51048/GB 50016消防安全文件不被接受为替代。须由合格消防工程师编制NFPA 855安装设计，并经瑙鲁当地消防机构审查批准。这独立于IEC 62619产品认证之外。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 諾魯BESS安裝審批要求提供NFPA 855合規證據——包括支持間距計算的UL 9540A熱失控蔓延測試結果。中國GB 51048/GB 50016消防安全文件不被接受為替代。須由合格消防工程師編制NFPA 855安裝設計，並經諾魯當地消防機構審查批准。這獨立於IEC 62619產品認證之外。

requirement_topic.en: Thermal runaway propagation — UL 9540A test evidence

summary.en: NFPA 855 requires thermal runaway propagation test data to establish safe installation spacing between BESS units and adjacent structures. UL 9540A (Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems) is the standard test method referenced in NFPA 855 for this purpose. Nauru project authorities require UL 9540A test reports from an accredited laboratory to approve BESS installation layouts.
summary.zh: NFPA 855要求提供热失控蔓延测试数据，以确定BESS设备与相邻结构之间的安全安装间距。UL 9540A（电池储能系统热失控火灾蔓延评估测试方法）是NFPA 855为此目的引用的标准测试方法。瑙鲁项目机构要求提供来自认可实验室的UL 9540A测试报告以批准BESS安装布局。
summary.zht: NFPA 855要求提供熱失控蔓延測試數據，以確定BESS設備與相鄰結構之間的安全安裝間距。UL 9540A（電池儲能系統熱失控火災蔓延評估測試方法）是NFPA 855為此目的引用的標準測試方法。諾魯項目機構要求提供來自認可實驗室的UL 9540A測試報告以批准BESS安裝布局。

standards_or_laws: UL 9540A:2023 (Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems)
NFPA 855:2023 (Sections 4.3 and 5.3 — separation and spacing requirements)

summary.en: China does not have a published national standard test method directly equivalent to UL 9540A. Thermal runaway testing under GB 38031 (EV traction batteries) uses different test conditions and does not produce the propagation data required for NFPA 855 spacing calculations. Some Chinese manufacturers have voluntarily obtained UL 9540A test reports for export markets, but this is not a standard GB certification requirement.
summary.zh: 中国没有与UL 9540A直接对应的已发布国家标准测试方法。GB 38031（电动汽车动力电池）下的热失控测试采用不同测试条件，不产生NFPA 855间距计算所需的蔓延数据。部分中国制造商已自愿为出口市场获取UL 9540A测试报告，但这不是标准GB认证要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與UL 9540A直接對應的已發布國家標準測試方法。GB 38031（電動汽車動力電池）下的熱失控測試採用不同測試條件，不產生NFPA 855間距計算所需的蔓延數據。部分中國製造商已自願為出口市場獲取UL 9540A測試報告，但這不是標準GB認證要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 38031-2020 (Clause 8.2 — thermal runaway test, different scope)

gap.en: UL 9540A thermal runaway propagation test data is required for NFPA 855 installation spacing design in Nauru. GB 38031 thermal runaway test results are not substitutes — the test conditions, measurement parameters, and output data are different. Chinese manufacturers must obtain UL 9540A reports from an accredited laboratory (UL Solutions, FM Approvals, or equivalent) specifically for the BESS module configuration being shipped.
gap.zh: 在瑙鲁进行NFPA 855安装间距设计须提供UL 9540A热失控蔓延测试数据。GB 38031热失控测试结果不能替代——测试条件、测量参数和输出数据均不同。中国制造商须从认可实验室（UL Solutions、FM Approvals或同等机构）获取针对所发货BESS模组配置的UL 9540A报告。
gap.zht: 在諾魯進行NFPA 855安裝間距設計須提供UL 9540A熱失控蔓延測試數據。GB 38031熱失控測試結果不能替代——測試條件、測量參數和輸出數據均不同。中國製造商須從認可實驗室（UL Solutions、FM Approvals或同等機構）獲取針對所發貨BESS模組配置的UL 9540A報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for NFPA 855 spacing design — Nauru installation approval
mandatory_status.cn: Not required by GB standards; voluntarily obtained by some manufacturers for export

source.publisher: Asian Development Bank (Nauru Solar Power Development Project)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UL 9540A test reports for the specific BESS module configuration are required to support NFPA 855 installation spacing design in Nauru. GB 38031 thermal runaway test data is not an accepted substitute. Manufacturers who already hold UL 9540A reports for their product should confirm the tested configuration matches the units being exported to Nauru. New test campaigns require 3–6 months lead time.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 需要提供针对具体BESS模组配置的UL 9540A测试报告，以支持瑙鲁NFPA 855安装间距设计。GB 38031热失控测试数据不被接受为替代。已持有产品UL 9540A报告的制造商应确认测试配置与出口至瑙鲁的设备相符。新测试项目需3–6个月交期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 需要提供針對具體BESS模組配置的UL 9540A測試報告，以支持諾魯NFPA 855安裝間距設計。GB 38031熱失控測試數據不被接受為替代。已持有產品UL 9540A報告的製造商應確認測試配置與出口至諾魯的設備相符。新測試項目需3–6個月交期。
